3083240.name: Bug.Splash TD
3083240.description:
The game:
Bug.Splash TD is a top down tower defense game with an elemental damage system. Keep bugs from reaching your gate by using elemental towers to apply a variety of unique special effects. Counter the enemy abilities through strategic placement and elemental combinations, but beware: Some elements might not work together! The game offers a nearly infinite upgrade system combined with custom difficulties, to keep gameplay interesting.

Why publish such an early preview?
I want people to play the game, the sooner the better. It helps collecting feedback + ideas and, in my opinion, increases motivation to go on with development.
